series_title.en: My Girlfriend: Never Let Your Guard Down

volumes_registered.title: My Girlfriend: Never Let Your Guard Down

209f.relationship_to_others: Boyfriend of Amasaki Kurumi; Classmate and close friend of Endou Kenta; Classmate and rival of Wada Akiba; Acquaintance of Amasaki Suzune and Amasaki Aoi.

speaking_to.Amasaki Kurumi: Initially polite, quickly shifts to casual at her request. Reverts to polite when extremely flustered or intimidated.
speaking_to.Amasaki Suzune: Polite (keigo) due to her being an older sister and university student.
speaking_to.Amasaki Aoi: Polite (keigo) initially, as she's a younger sister and first meeting.

emotional_shifts.embarrassment: Frequent stammering, reverts to polite speech.
emotional_shifts.excitement/happiness: Exclamations, rapid speech, sometimes stumbles over words.

keigo_switch.notes: Souta's speech reflects his internal state; politeness often indicates discomfort or respect, while casual speech is his default with peers.

209f.character_arc: Initially a passive, self-deprecating student who unexpectedly gets a beautiful girlfriend. He navigates the complexities of her yandere tendencies, eventually deciding to actively help her broaden her social circle despite his fears, and ultimately accepts her deep affection.

209f.relationship_to_others: Has an older sister and a younger sister. Acquaintance of Amasaki Kurumi, Wada Akiba, Amasaki Suzune, and Amasaki Aoi.

speaking_to.Amasaki Suzune: Polite (keigo) due to age and initial meeting, but can be direct.
speaking_to.Amasaki Aoi: Polite (keigo) due to initial meeting, but can be direct.

emotional_shifts.surprise: Rarely shows, but can be seen in subtle facial changes.
emotional_shifts.amusement: A small 'fufufu' or a slight smile, often at Souta's expense.

keigo_switch.notes: Endou's speech is consistently low-key and rational, even when discussing emotional topics. He avoids unnecessary words.

209f.character_arc: Introduced as Souta's quiet classmate. Becomes a confidant and eventually a key ally in Souta's plan to help Kurumi, demonstrating his loyalty and pragmatic problem-solving skills.

209f.relationship_to_protagonist: Amasaki Kurumi's older sister; Ally in helping Kurumi.
209f.relationship_to_others: Older sister of Amasaki Kurumi and Amasaki Aoi.

speaking_to.Uchida Souta: Polite (keigo) and gentle, but also playful.

emotional_shifts.seriousness: Direct gaze, calm but firm tone, often with a sad undertone when discussing past trauma.

keigo_switch.notes: Suzune's speech is consistently refined and thoughtful, reflecting her maturity and elegance. She uses politeness as a default but can be quite direct when needed.

209f.character_arc: Introduced as Kurumi's older sister who, along with Aoi, seeks to understand and help Kurumi's relationship with Souta. She becomes a key strategist and emotional support for Souta in his efforts.

name_order.policy: Japanese surname-first order for Japanese characters.

translation_rules.style: Natural English prose matching the genre tone.
